provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Vaelk proxy vessel in a busy cross-species market — a featureless dark matte cylinder on an anti-gravity pad, 1.5 meters tall, no visible features except a small speaker grille and cargo hatch, perfectly smooth and unworn while every other surface in frame shows age, other species giving it a wide respectful berth, the unsettling blankness of an intelligence that won't show itself
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Strong hit — concept reads clearly, style consistent, gritty lived-in aesthetic.
